source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The truncated right circular cone below has a large base radius 8 cm and a small base radius of 4 cm. The height of the truncated cone is 6 cm.  The volume of this solid is $n \pi$ cubic cm, where $n$ is an integer.  What is $n$? <image1>
